groups.name: Computer Science Major
groups.description: Required core courses for the B.Comp CS major.

groups.name: CIS Electives (4000 level)
groups.description: CIS courses at the 4000 level, beyond named major and AoE courses.

groups.name: CIS Electives (3000+ level)
groups.description: CIS courses at the 3000 level or above, beyond named major and AoE courses.

groups.name: Free Electives
groups.description: Any university courses, tracked separately from your AoE.

areasOfEmphasis.name: Cybersecurity
areasOfEmphasis.description: Protecting computer systems and networks from cyber threats: security risks, cryptography, and secure system design.

areasOfEmphasis.name: Data Science
areasOfEmphasis.description: Analysis and interpretation of large data sets: data analysis, visualization, and machine learning.

areasOfEmphasis.name: User Experience (UX)
areasOfEmphasis.description: User-centered design: research user needs and design, build, and test interactive prototypes.

areasOfEmphasis.name: Artificial Intelligence (AI)
areasOfEmphasis.description: Designing systems that learn, reason, and solve problems: machine learning, neural networks, and AI ethics.
